[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100010 2
1 1101111 6
2 1111110 6
3 0111110 5
4 1111000 4
5 1111101 6
6 0111101 5
7 0110010 3

23 32 0001000 1

67 76 1101110 5
70 07 0111110 5 match 3
